query:
ALTER TABLE consignment_records 
  ADD COLUMN soldVia VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'null=not sold, sale=sold via sale registration',
  ADD COLUMN saleId INT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'FK to sales table if sold',
  ADD COLUMN soldAt BIGINT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'timestamp when marked as sold';

  ADD COLUMN saleId INT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'FK to sales table if sold',
